violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. Clear containers by the slicer with white powder in are un labeled.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave above the can opener needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Front hood system has a build-up of debris on the suppression system and the walls above the fryers.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the dish machine, and the wall by the tilt skillet need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop stored in used mop water from the night prior, needs to be hung to allow proper air drying.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
